text: EX_HIIT_moderate_20min was rejected for user_student_anxious during exam period because energy state 3/10 and sleep deprivation make high-intensity exercise unsafe and contraindicated.
User tried group yoga class one month ago and quit after two sessions. Finds group dynamics anxiety-provoking. Do not re-suggest unless explicitly requested.
EX_walk_30min was rejected for user_athlete_injured because walking caused knee pain after 5 minutes. Do not surface until medical clearance is confirmed.
HIIT is contraindicated during active knee injury recovery. Do not suggest until full medical clearance.
45-min combined session was rejected during peak burnout period — user cannot commit to sessions over 20 minutes in current state. Revisit when energy score improves above 6/10.

Resistance training rejected because user does not own equipment and finds gym registration overwhelming at this stage. Do not suggest equipment-dependent sessions until user explicitly requests them.
30-min yoga session is too long for user's current 10-15 minute maximum window. Replace with EX_yoga_gentle_15min or EX_stretching_10min.
Evening gym routine rejected — user has no energy by 6pm during burnout. Mornings only are viable. Do not suggest evening structured exercise.
